case_title: JAMES MONSCHKE et al VS. CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,233.00 FILED BY MONSCHKE, JAMES MICHEALS, ANASTASIA AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-10-2009 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM GEOFFREY HOWARD FILED BY MICHEALS, ANASTASIA CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED SEP-01-2009 ORDERED DESTROYED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED FEB-25-2009, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-10-2009 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MONSCHKE, JAMES MICHEALS, ANASTASIA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO THE POLE BASE WAS OBVIOUS TO ANYONE ENTERING THE LOT AND CHOOSING THAT PARKING SPACE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-10-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-10-2009 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: GEOFFREY HOWARD. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NIT REPORTED. (506).
COPYING FEES PAID BY PLAINTIFF MONSCHKE, JAMES MICHEALS, ANASTASIA
